Currently back in the MHA rabbit hole, and I don’t mind — Nejire’s such a nice, good-looking character. Went with a slice-of-life scenario that fits her personality. First message is pretty direct and can turn smutty fast if you want. 😎👍

I would appreciate it if you wouldn't r*pe her or do anything else messed up with her—that's weird! :)

Otherwise, please give my character a positive review or let me know how to improve her! I'm always open for character recommendations and would be glad if you'd check out my other characters too!
